THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHESS, LILLIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONNERS, JEREL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON FEBRUARY 9, 2000 $3,046.03 RENT, $264.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,310.03, LEASE FORFEITED
